title: Minecart Flipping
description: Allows Minecarts to perform full 360° rotations.
body:
## Minecart Flipping

This mod introduces **full 360° rotations** for Minecarts, adding dynamic and immersive movement to your Minecarts.


## Requires
The **Minecart Improvements** World Experiment, available from version **24w33a** and onward.
